title: Databricks Runtime 18.2 and Databricks Runtime 18.2 ML are in Beta
body:
Databricks Runtime 18.2 and Databricks Runtime 18.2 ML are now in Beta, powered by Apache Spark 4.1.0.

See [Databricks Runtime 18.2](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/18.2) and [Databricks Runtime 18.2 for Machine Learning](/aws/en/release-notes/runtime/18.2ml).
